pages.en_preview: "And the fire, the water and the wine are for the purification of all the sins of the world. pages.en_preview: The mystic offering. And Jesus |375. said unto them: "Bring me fire and vine branches." They brought them unto him. pages.en_preview: Of the chastisement of the thief. Jesus said: "If the time of such an one is completed through the sphere, the receivers of Adōnis come after him, and lead his soul out of the body, and they spend three days circling round with it and instructing it concerning the creatures of the world. pages.pl_preview: |384.\n\nO karaniu złodzieja. pages.pl_preview: 'Jeśli z drugiej strony Ares i Kronos przychodzą przed oblicze Dziewicy, a Zeus i Afrodyta za nią, tak że ich nie widzi, wtedy wszystkie dusze, które wrzuci w owej godzinie do stworzeń sfery, będą niegodziwe i gniewliwe, i nie znajdą misteriów Światłości.'
